                    <script type="text/javascript">
                        function recordOutboundLink(link, category, action) {
                            ga('send', 'event', category, action);
                            if (link.target == '_blank') return true;
                            setTimeout('document.location = "' + link.href + '"', 100);
                            return false;
                        }

                        /* use regular Javascript for this */
                        function getAttr(ele, attr) {
                            var result = (ele.getAttribute && ele.getAttribute(attr)) || null;
                            if (!result) {
                                var attrs = ele.attributes;
                                var length = attrs.length;
                                for (var i = 0; i < length; i++)
                                    if (attr[i].nodeName === attr) result = attr[i].nodeValue;
                            }
                            return result;
                        }

                        function aiosp_addLoadEvent(func) {
                            var oldonload = window.onload;
                            if (typeof window.onload != 'function') {
                                window.onload = func;
                            } else {
                                window.onload = function () {
                                    if (oldonload) {
                                        oldonload();
                                    }
                                    func();
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        function aiosp_addEvent(element, evnt, funct) {
                            if (element.attachEvent)
                                return element.attachEvent('on' + evnt, funct);
                            else
                                return element.addEventListener(evnt, funct, false);
                        }

                        aiosp_addLoadEvent(function () {
                            var links = document.getElementsByTagName('a');
                            for (var x = 0; x < links.length; x++) {
                                if (typeof links[x] == 'undefined') continue;
                                aiosp_addEvent(links[x], 'onclick', function () {
                                    var mydomain = new RegExp(document.domain, 'i');
                                    href = getAttr(this, 'href');
                                    if (href && href.toLowerCase().indexOf('http') === 0 && !mydomain.test(href)) {
                                        recordOutboundLink(this, 'Outbound Links', href);
                                    }
                                });
                            }
                        });
                    </script>

        <h2 class="heading ta-c">
          <img decoding="async" src="http://heisei-ph-recruit.com/wp-content/themes/hc/lib/images/recruit/recruit_ttl_1.png" alt="新卒採用 募集要項">
        </h2>

        <h3 class="heading w_line">
          <span>薬剤師</span>
        </h3>

        <ul class="table_red mb100">
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">給与</span>
            <p class="article">平均253,500円（各種手当含）</p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">通勤手当</span>
            <p class="article">全額支給（上限30,000円）</p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">昇給制度</span>
            <p class="article">
              あり
            </p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">賞与</span>
            <p class="article">
              年3回　薬剤師職平均5ヶ月<br>
              ※前年度実績
            </p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">退職金</span>
            <p class="article">勤続3年以上</p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">勤務時間</span>
            <p class="article">
              1日実働8時間（週40時間のシフト勤務）
            </p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">休日</span>
            <p class="article">
              週休2日制<br>
              年間休日120日
            </p>
          </li>
          <li>
            <span class="table_ttl _horizontal">休暇</span>
            <p class="article">
              有給休暇初年度10日<br>
              祝日、年末年始、慶弔休暇、産前産後休業、育児休業、介護休業
            </p>
          </li>
        </ul>
        <p class="heading ta-c e-img_link">
          <a href="../entry/"><img decoding="async" src="http://heisei-ph-recruit.com/wp-content/themes/hc/lib/images/internship/intern_entry.png" alt="ENTRY"></a>
        </p>
      </section>
